rationale: Glasswing intentionally renders Press-sanitized content and its own escaped or static templates. Exact source fingerprints keep each direct HTML write and each reviewed wrapper call visible without changing release-bearing theme source.

wrappers.name: setHtml
wrappers.rationale: setHtml is Glasswing's local live-DOM rendering wrapper; every call is fingerprinted so template or caller growth requires review.

approved.rationale: The loading-state caller supplies a source-static Glasswing notice template with no interpolated input.
The home caller delegates to Glasswing's owned card renderer, which escapes text and attributes and accepts Press-rendered excerpts through the theme contract.
The error-state template escapes the title, message, action label, and action href before inserting the owned notice markup.
The list-view caller delegates to the owned list renderer, whose variable text and route attributes are escaped before insertion.
The post caller escapes theme-owned metadata and renders markdownHtml supplied by Press's reviewed rendering boundary.
The tab caller escapes the heading and renders markdownHtml supplied by Press's reviewed rendering boundary.
The constant empty-string assignment removes hidden footer links and does not parse attacker-controlled markup.
The shared region reset assigns only a constant empty string and does not parse attacker-controlled markup.
This is the single local live-DOM wrapper; every call is separately fingerprinted and classified, including Press-rendered content inputs.
The footer skeleton is a source-static Glasswing template; later identity and link values use textContent or escaped templates.
Footer link labels are escaped, profile URLs pass sanitizeUrl, and every rendered href is escaped as an attribute.
A detached template parses Press-rendered markdown only to read the first image source; it is never attached to the live document.
The disabled theme-controls branch assigns only a constant empty string before hiding the host region.
Navigation labels and helper-produced route hrefs are escaped before insertion into Glasswing's owned anchor template.
The fallback writes tocHtml produced by Press when the press-toc component does not expose its owned renderToc method.
The theme-controls reset assigns only a constant empty string before remounting the trusted Press control component.
